description: Homeowner early in the HVAC buying process. Patient 5-email education sequence over 28 days.

subject_lines: Your {{ home.tonnage }}-ton sizing — and the HVAC-buying roadmap
Your {{ location.city }} HVAC sizing + what to expect next
sequence.preheader: Most HVAC purchases take weeks, not hours. Here is what each phase looks like.

subject_lines: Central AC, heat pump, or mini-split: which one for your home?
sequence.preheader: A heat pump is not always right; central AC is not always wrong. Here is how to choose.

subject_lines: SEER2, HSPF2, AFUE: which efficiency numbers matter
When higher HVAC efficiency pays back
sequence.preheader: A higher-efficiency unit is not automatically a better buy. The payback math decides.

subject_lines: The HVAC rebate stack — and the {{ location.state }} programs to check
Federal, state, and utility HVAC rebates: how the stack works
sequence.preheader: Federal credit, state rebate, utility rebate. Some stack, but the paperwork matters.

subject_lines: You are ready to hire. Here is how to actually do it.
sequence.preheader: You have the sizing, system type, efficiency math, and rebate path. Last step: bids.

personalization_variables.home.sqft: number — square footage from the load calc
personalization_variables.location.climate_region: string — Hot / Warm / Mixed / Cool / Cold

notes: Uses the same template-data shape as personas 1 and 2.
